title: Otomo HUD
description: HUD sprites themed after hololive English's Cecilia Immergreen.
body:
This resourcepack replaces HUD sprites with versions themed after hololive English's Cecilia Immergreen.

- Hearts become quavers (or semiquavers, in Hardcore mode). ![A light-green pair of quavers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2796e00cfc016982119325edb622013e34d95524_0.webp)
- Hunger is represented by wind-up keys. ![A brass wind-up key](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e9ea209ff24f5e620797981e05a2675cf8a27c5.png)
- Armor is shown as Cecilia's neckerchief. ![A red neckerchief with a silver brooch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4a4e9bbe7f103bc56887e13a9d768745cf17201.png)
- And air by her Otomos! ![An Otomo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2552a1cc20c5889f4d0b1eb7a1783b936c2d617d.png)
